categories.label: In-Game VP
categories.description: VP earned during 6 rounds from building, round scoring tiles, power actions, technology tiles, research bonuses, and Federations

categories.label: Research Track VP
categories.description: End-game VP from positions on the 6 research tracks (escalating VP per level reached)

categories.label: Final Scoring Tile 1
categories.description: VP from the first Final scoring tile category (18/12/6/0 for 1st/2nd/3rd/4th)

categories.label: Final Scoring Tile 2
categories.description: VP from the second Final scoring tile category (18/12/6/0 for 1st/2nd/3rd/4th)

categories.label: Leftover Resources
categories.description: VP from converting remaining resources (every 3 Ore/Credits/Knowledge = 1 VP, each Q.I.C. = 1 VP)

win_condition: Player with the most total VP after 6 rounds and final scoring wins
